title: Real Escape Game x Evangelion Escape from an Angel
display_title: Real Escape Game x Evangelion Escape from an Angel
wikitext:
[]: Real Escape Game x Evangelion: Escape from an Angel             Quote Post by AR-99 » Sun Aug 26, 2012 9:00 pm I had the opportunity to play this yesterday at the J-Pop Summit Festival. Essentially it is a mystery simulation game that has the players looking for clues throughout a local environment and solving them, put on by Japanese company SCRAP. No prior knowledge whatsoever of Eva was required but it added to the enjoyment. You can play by yourself but it is best to play with others as a team. This was my first Real Escape Game and I wasn't going to do it at first but figured why not since how many other people around the world get to experience this. The way the game works is that practically everything that you encounter can be a clue and thus you need to keep an open mind to solve the puzzles. However you are also operating under a time limit. Flyer: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Rj123541 » Wed Sep 12, 2012 12:30 am I would like to play it.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Wed Sep 12, 2012 12:04 pm They didn't have the photo booth set up at the time unfortunately, that would have been fun.
